metadata.description: Stratafy is the operating system for strategy. These plugins bring strategic intelligence into Claude — from workspace management and coaching to strategic finance and daily execution for every team member.

plugins.name: stratafy-guardian
plugins.description: Guardian of your strategy. Watches over structural health, content quality, execution alignment, and strategic coherence — surfacing what needs attention before it becomes a problem.

plugins.name: stratafy-finance
plugins.description: Your AI finance partner — connects every rand to strategic intent. Chart of accounts design, financial alignment scans, budget mapping, pricing models, metrics analysis, quarterly reviews, and investor prep.

plugins.name: stratafy-team
plugins.description: Your AI execution partner — connects daily work to company strategy. Daily rhythm, weekly briefings, strategic context, role-adapted coaching, and presentation craft for every team member.

plugins.name: stratafy-chief-of-staff
plugins.description: Your AI Chief of Staff — cross-functional alignment, executive reporting, initiative tracking, decision facilitation, and operational rhythm for leadership teams.
